transcript.clean_text: it was time for stage four day five of the tour of romedy taking us from eagle to xenon val the anivier of 180.1 kilometers without a shadow of a doubt the queen stage of this race with well over 4 000 meters of elevation and six categorized climbs and a hilltop finish into zenel well over 1600 meters there's the profile a flat fast start before the first climb at just over 60 k's and early on we had a big breakaway of about 12 riders that was reduced to han van hooker oscar rodriguez james knox john izzy gilley tom scoynes and niels brun and the chase behind was being done very very effectively indeed by jumbo bismuth rhone dennis in the green jersey of leader looked good all day long the sun shone and we were treated to some absolutely beautiful sights near the zinal glacier toms coins was the first to be dropped from the remnants of the breakaway but safe in the knowledge he had secured the lead in the king of the mountains classification so the latvian champion having a very very good day and then there were three the remnants oscar rodriguez of movie star james knox of quick step alpha vinyl and john izzigeli of spain held on to a lead of two minutes heading into the final two climbers of the day and still with the stranglehold on the race where the men in yellow jumbo bismuth doing an absolutely superb job for their race leader knox soon fell away and the lead slips to just under one minute and there was a big acceleration from behind from einel rubio the young colombian sweeping past his teammate oscar rodriguez a glance across and he was free the chasing been done at this point by sep cuss but one man who was struggling on the day was the defending champion number one at garrett thomas of the ineos grenadiers he wasn't to remain in at the front group so the chase was on and luke plapp the australian road race champion eager to try and bring back a flying aina rubio the headwind finish making it very very difficult indeed for one solo rider but looking dominant looking confident and leading at one point with the race leader rowan dennis glancing across as if to say is that all you've got in the last 300 meters a brave rubio was finally caught by luke platt determined to try and break free it wasn't to be though there was a big acceleration on the left-hand side of the road by the colombian champion sergio iguita of border hansgrow and what an acceleration it was on his willie's teammate alexander vlassoff and borah hamsgrub would to be absolutely delighted they scored one two on the stage nigita taking win number four of the year and look at what that meant to his teammate big big day for borah hansbrough 1-2 on the stage but the lead remaining on the shoulders of rowan dennis so igita took the stage ahead of alexander vlassof juan are you so in third ben o'connor fourth then we have two willpino mike woods gino maida sebastian reichenbach simogeske and look at that moment one and two delight for igita and also for vlasov absolutely superb scenes shake of the head there by bin o'connor but delight all round for the 24 year old from madilyn fourth win of the year for him and a couple of nice prizes and a smile around after a difficult opening a few days big change in the kingdom mountains tom scoyne's overhauled chris newlands and will be the winner of that competition ahead of james knox a very popular rider in the peloton enjoying his moment on the podium tom scoyne is the latvian champion big big day in the saddle and he's just desserts too so going in to the final stage of the twitter remedy rowan dennis still leads joanne yusso by 15 seconds and we have alexander vlasov ben o'connor lucas plapp gino maida sebastian reichenbach and nielsen palace following him let's see moving himself into the top 10 and rounding out the top 10 riders step class so another day in the green jersey of leaders and another big lump of cheese for rowan dennis with his favorite terrain still to come make sure you do not miss the final stage of the tour of roman d whether victor will be crowned it's an individual time trial 15.7 kilometers long but with 878 vertical meters of elevation from ale to villars see you then
